stop.command: python3 -c "import subprocess,sys,shutil; _g=shutil.which('git'); _r=subprocess.run([_g,'status','--short'],capture_output=True,text=True) if _g else None; _c=(_r.stdout if (_r and not _r.returncode) else ''); any(p in _c for p in ('.agents/sync/','asset_manifest.toml','sync_policy.py','.cursor/','.claude/','.codex/','.gemini/','.github/copilot-instructions.md')) and print('[SYNC-LAYER2] direct-bundle sync policy or assistant-root surface touched — when repos-root exists, run orchestrate_local_agent_sync.py inspect before merge/apply; see config-sync.plan.md.'); sys.exit(0)"

python3 -c "import subprocess,sys,shutil; _g=shutil.which('git'); _r=subprocess.run([_g,'status','--short'],capture_output=True,text=True) if _g else None; _c=(_r.stdout if (_r and not _r.returncode) else ''); _roots=('.agents/','.cursor/','.claude/','.codex/','.gemini/'); [print(m) for m in ['[USAGE-LOG] Governance files modified - create/update .agents/reports/usage/ entry','  Required fields: When | Agent/runtime | Model/backend | What | Impacted | Workflow context | Verification | Close-out'] if any(r in _c for r in _roots)]; sys.exit(0)"

preToolUse.command: python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command','');lc=cmd.lower();('sync_agent_configs.py' in lc and print('[GUARD] High-impact script detected. Human approval required. See AGENTS.md and the current assistant entry doc before proceeding.'));('port_workspace_safety_config.py' in lc and print('[GUARD] port_workspace_safety_config.py writes app-level config (~/.cursor, ~/.codex, ~/.claude or --target-dir). Require approved plan and explicit confirmation. May pip install jsonschema/tomli-w; prefer repo .venv.'));(('.agents/scripts/' in lc or '.agents\\scripts\\' in lc) and all(h not in lc for h in ('.venv/', '.venv\\', 'venv/', 'venv\\')) and print('[GUARD] Repo script detected without repo venv. Use the repository virtualenv by default unless the user explicitly approved otherwise.'))"
